history.content:
<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right (`>`). The cell directly ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should avoid that and turn to find a safe path, likely downward through the open cells.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down (`v`). The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, so I should move forward to continue along the safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell in front at row 04 column B is safe floor, and continuing downward keeps me on the open path toward the lower corridor and then the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 04 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe, so I should keep moving forward to reach the lower open area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 06 column B is safe floor, and moving forward continues along the only open vertical route toward the lower-right goal area.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 07 column B is lava, so I cannot move forward. To get around the lava barrier and reach the open path toward the goal, I should turn right to face the safe corridor to the east.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing left. The cell ahead to the west is a wall, so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to face the open corridor; turning right twice from left would point me down, but down is lava. Turning right once points me up, where the path is open toward the upper route around the obstacle.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 06 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 05 column B is safe floor, so moving forward advances me toward the upper area where I can navigate around the lava barrier and eventually toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 05 column B facing up, but the cell ahead at row 04 column B is open, so I should continue moving forward. This keeps me progressing through the safe path toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am now at row 04 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, so moving forward is the best step to keep heading toward the goal while avoiding the lava wall on the right.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing up. The cell ahead at row 02 column B is safe floor, and moving there continues the path upward toward the open area that can lead right to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>

</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing right. The cell ahead at row 02 column C is lava, so moving forward would be deadly. I should turn downward first to avoid the lava and find a safe route.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 02 column B facing down. The cell directly ahead at row 03 column B is safe floor, and moving there keeps me along the left side where there is an open path downward. I should move forward.
</thought>
<action>

<thought>
I am at row 03 column B facing down. The cell ahead at row 04 column B is safe floor, so continuing forward keeps me progressing along the open left column toward the lower passage.

MOVE_FORWARD

<action>

<thought>
